full_text:
Li Li (Jizi) 李歷
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Li (李歷), styledJizi, was born in Hanzhong. Advised against surrender to Yuan Shao. Described as an honourable man. Li Li was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Han Fu Dynasty.
